title: HTML for Web Applications Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the essential tags and features for creating interactive web applications.

questions.question: Which tag allows you to define HTML content that is NOT rendered immediately when the page loads?
options: <hidden>
<template>
<script>
<aside>

questions.question: The <slot> element is used for which primary purpose in Web Components?
options: To define a secondary navigation menu.
To act as a placeholder for custom markup within a reusable component.
To separate the HTML from CSS styles.
To store data in the browser's LocalStorage.

questions.question: What is 'Shadow DOM'?
options: A hidden copy of the page used for search engines.
A way to encapsulate HTML and CSS styles to prevent them from affecting the rest of the page.
The background layer of a web page.
A script used to track user behavior secretly.

questions.question: Which <link> attribute is used to connect a web application to its manifest JSON file for PWA support?
options: rel='app'
rel='manifest'
rel='icon'
rel='config'

questions.question: Which of these is the most accurate description of the <template> tag's contents?
options: They are invisible to the user but visible to search engines.
The browser ignores them until they are instantiated via JavaScript.
They are automatically added to the bottom of the <body> tag.
They are only used to store CSS styles.
